_doc: which parses this with jq (no yq/YAML tooling needed).
mode: off | warn | enforce. The workflow_dispatch `threshold_mode` input overrides it when set.
off     -> all metric checks report neutral; the gate never fails on a threshold.
warn    -> breaches reported as `warn`; the gate does NOT fail (default).
enforce -> breaches reported as `fail`; the gate fails the workflow.
A metric whose `value` is "TBD" is unconfigured: it reports neutral regardless of
mode, until a real value is measured on a dedicated (non-noisy) runner. Most values are TBD
today because the sibling areas have no tooling yet.
core-apply-load is gated on the upstream EC2 load test's hard pass/fail verdict (a correctness
check), independent of mode. The ingest_ledgers_per_sec metric below is a FORWARD HOOK only: the
test's perf metrics are not yet surfaced to the coordinator, so nothing compares it today.
